required_checks.detail: Items, sources and evidence references are intact.
Iran and demo case pack manifests are present.
Bundled previews exist or fallback is available.
Candidates and AI outputs are staged, not directly published.
No frontend API key requirement; backend stores runtime config server-side.
System explanation and operating manual included.
GitHub push and ChatGPT integration guide included.
Ethics, security, data and responsible-use files included.
Contributing, code of conduct and issue templates included.
Case pack and approval decision schemas included.
Report templates and report-ready outputs retained.

acceptance: Release can be published as a stable community-ready v1.0 bundle.
